# Ohayou Anime

> Ohayou Anime is a streaming destination for anime series, episodes, and short-form clips with a custom theater-mode player, watchlists, and search.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured series, continue watching, new episodes, and trending shorts.
- [Browse](/browse): Discovery hub for all series and episodes.
- [Search](/search): Search and filter the full anime catalog.
- [Shorts](/shorts): Vertical short-form anime clips feed.
- [Copyright Policy](/copyright-policy): DMCA and copyright information.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account login and signup.
